title: Executive Order 12387—Adjustments of Certain Rates of Pay and Allowances

flags.justification: A comprehensive but precisely bounded pay-schedule adjustment across multiple statutory pay systems, consistent with EO 12087.
Precise, statute-anchored schedules for each covered pay system.
Multiple related pay adjustments all coherently serve one purpose: annual federal pay adjustment.
A pay-schedule adjustment, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing annual pay-adjustment mechanism, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed; this cleanly supersedes a prior order (EO 12330).
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A routine, objectively-bounded annual federal pay adjustment.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
